channel.title: Waves on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Waves on Compossible

item.title: My God! You Lunatic!
item.description:
Another morning

I awake and shake

My tired head

Warm the old

Cold coffee

That’s when the panic hits me

‘My God!, you lunatic!

What have you done?

Look what you wrote!

Do you remember what you said?

You imagined it all! ‘

A dreadful waking fever dream

Curse these amygdalan frenzies
